comment: Broker-specific symbol blacklists - allows different strategies per broker

BTCUSDm.reason: PF=0.31 on Exness, -$55 on Binance Futures (182 trades, avg win $0.39 vs avg loss $1.57)
BTCUSDm.note: Allowed on Binance SPOT for client testing

ETHUSDm.reason: PF=0.19 on Exness, similar failure pattern to BTC
ETHUSDm.note: Allowed on Binance SPOT for client testing

BTCUSDT.reason: Losing on Futures, but profitable on demo Spot - testing on live Spot

ETHUSDT.reason: Matches ETHUSDm failure on Futures, allowed on Spot for testing

notes.binance_spot_testing: BTCUSDT and ETHUSDT allowed on Binance SPOT for client validation. Demo showed profits, need 30+ live trades to confirm.
notes.exness_protection: All unprofitable symbols blocked on Exness. Focus on GBPUSDm (PF=1.15, +99 ZAR) and XAUUSDm.
notes.binance_futures: All crypto blocked on Futures due to -$55 loss (PF=0.44). Funding fees and liquidation risk too high.
notes.client_strategy: Test Spot first with own money, then offer to clients if profitable. No 10x multiplier for clients initially.
